backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing customer registration/login, service order management, admin QR settings, payment confirmations, and user profiles, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that strips the unused `nextDocumentId` field from the old actor state, mapping it to the new state shape without that field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: persistent customer session via localStorage, logout clearing session and redirecting, and fixing unauthorized errors on order submission.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to one-sentence summaries describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'Vijay Online Centre', loading Poppins and Noto Sans Devanagari fonts and mounting the Vite/React entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component managing a screen state machine for navigation between splash, login, and main screens, with session restoration from AuthContext and logout redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component that lists all service orders in expandable cards with status filters and Accept/Reject/Confirm Payment actions, polling for real-time updates.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Renders a secure admin login form with user ID and password fields, using the AuthContext's adminLogin function to authenticate and calling onSuccess or displaying an error on result.
frontend/src/components/AdminQRManagemen: Admin panel component for managing payment QR codes, supporting permanent QR image upload, setting a default QR, and configuring an auto-amount via tabbed UI backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Static contact page displaying the business helpline number with action buttons for WhatsApp chat, direct phone call, and Google Maps location.
frontend/src/components/CustomerLogin.ts: Customer-facing authentication component supporting manual login, registration, and OTP-based login modes, using React Query mutations and storing the session via AuthContext on success.
frontend/src/components/Home.tsx: Home dashboard component showing a personalized welcome header, quick-access action grid navigating to other tabs, and a highlights strip summarizing key service features.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell component that renders a top bar with logo/logout, scrollable content area, and bottom navigation tabs, switching between customer and admin tab sets based on auth context.
frontend/src/components/LoginSelection.t: Landing screen presenting two login options (Customer and Admin) with branded header, routing to the appropriate login flow via callback props.
frontend/src/components/MyOrders.tsx: Customer-facing orders list page that fetches orders by mobile number, sorts them by timestamp, and displays each order's status with color-coded badges and navigation to order detail/receipt views.
frontend/src/components/OrderTracking.ts: Order detail page showing a step-by-step progress tracker through four stages (Submitted → Payment → Processing → Completed) for a specific order, supporting both customer and admin views.
frontend/src/components/PaymentScreen.ts: Payment page that displays a UPI QR code (either a stored permanent QR image or a canvas-generated placeholder) along with order and service info for completing payment.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Printable receipt component that fetches a specific order and renders its details in a styled card with a print button, accessible by both customers and admins.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCatalog.t: Displays a searchable, categorized list of all available services, allowing users to select a service to proceed with. Filters services by name, category, or description using a search input.
frontend/src/components/ServiceForm.tsx: Renders a form for submitting a service order, handling file uploads to blob storage and requiring an authenticated customer session. Shows a login-required guard if no session exists.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Displays an animated splash/loading screen with the app logo, name, and Hindi welcome message for 2.5 seconds before calling onComplete. Purely presentational with no user interaction.
frontend/src/components/VijayAIChatbot.t: Implements a floating AI chatbot widget that responds to user messages using keyword-based responses from chatbotResponses data. Toggles a chat panel with message history and a text input.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides a React context managing both admin and customer authentication sessions, persisting state to localStorage. Exposes login/logout methods and session data for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/data/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a list of keyword-to-response mappings for the Vijay AI chatbot covering topics like services, payments, tracking, and contact info. Exports a getBotResponse function that matches user input to the appropriate response.
frontend/src/data/services.ts: Defines a Service interface and exports an array of 32 government/utility services (certificates, ID cards, pensions, etc.) with id, name, category, icon, and description fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, customer auth (register/login), order submission and retrieval, order status updates, and admin QR settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a navy-blue and silver color theme with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes and reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Defines an ExternalBlob utility class that wraps file data as either raw bytes or a URL, supporting conversion between the two formats and optional upload progress callbacks.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, silver, gold, oklch-based semantic tokens), fonts (Poppins, Noto Sans Devanagari), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations using typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for the Vijay Online Centre app, documenting version, architecture notes, known authentication bugs (persistent session, logout, unauthorized form submission), existing features being fixed, and pending new feature requests.
